title: Subject
description: A participant enrolled in a clinical trial. Maps to SDTM domain DM (Demographics).

study_id.description: Foreign key to the Study entity.

site_id.description: Foreign key to the Site where the subject is enrolled.

subject_number.description: Site-specific subject identification number. CDISC DM variable: SUBJID.

enrollment_date.description: Date of informed consent. CDISC DM variable: RFICDTC.

date_of_birth.description: Subject date of birth. CDISC DM variable: BRTHDTC.

sex.description: Biological sex. CDISC DM variable: SEX. Controlled terminology: CDISC CT.

race.description: Subject race. CDISC DM variable: RACE. Controlled terminology: CDISC CT.

ethnicity.description: Subject ethnicity. CDISC DM variable: ETHNIC.

treatment_arm.description: Assigned treatment arm. CDISC DM variable: ARMCD.

withdrawal_date.description: Date of withdrawal from study, if applicable.
